Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Patrick Heard.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Discover Bank FKA Greenwood Trust Company.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing the declaration of Robert Atkins that was previously filed, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Samih H. Shehadeh.
Prinicipal: $42,959.68
Interest: $5,508.36
Attorney fees: $1,678.79
Costs: $309.50
Counsel to prepare judgment.

Mar. 27, 2006
Judgment rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
